deck_goal: Show that the repo creates a reviewable workflow for accurate, clear, visually checked presentations.

sessions.summary: Initial demo review focuses on integrity, clarity, and visual restraint.

slide_reviews.note: Opening is clear and does not overclaim.

recurring_issues: Avoid implying native Google Slides generation exists today.
Do not let QA claims sound broader than the browser checks actually perform.
new_rules: Every demo deck must include a current-versus-future boundary slide.
Visual QA claims must name concrete checks.
